default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: The celebrated Hero of the West District, in the flesh... No? Does the title not suit you? My apologies. What name would you prefer to wear?

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: This reminds me of... my days in the Black Ring.

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: Flesh and memory are fleeting things, so easily borrowed or lost. But consciousness? That's the ultimate survivor... When the light pierces through, which shard of me is the real one looking back...?

default.title: Level Start
default.text: Let the performance begin.

default.title: Victory
default.text: Target's down. I could use a drink after that. Care to join?

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: Seems like we’ll have to take a detour to complete our mission.

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: Hold still, my friend.

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: Finally... an end that is truly my own.

default.title: Greeting
default.text: Well, well... seems my target of the day has got their eyes on me already. Feeling sharp, I see. Perfect.

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: A bullet can make the most compelling point, if one doesn't mind the vulgar noise.

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: Fate is a story written for someone else. I, however, am in the business of editing the manuscript.

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: I caught a glimpse of you once, from afar. It left me wondering what kind of soul could hold such sway over that Legion leader. Now that you're here... the mystery is far more compelling up close. Shall we solve it together?

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: Surviving the Black Ring? Heh, that was the easy part. The true trial begins after... when you must look in the mirror and learn to live with the stranger staring back.

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: The "Ring" stripped away my flesh, shattered my bones, and forced me to devour the bodies of others just to survive... So now, I live in a body that is both mine and not my own. Only my heartbeat reminds me that something of me still remains.

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: A foe like the Black Ring... I'm profoundly glad I don't have to face it alone. And having you here... makes all the difference.

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: I've built this persona from a chaos of other people's pasts—a useful tool, I admit. But you... you make me want to build something real. A memory that is genuinely mine, to hold every moment I never want to lose with you.

default.title: Idle
default.text: Do take your time. I'll happily wait with a good book or a martini.

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: To have such... dedicated attention from you is an honor I scarcely deserve.

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: My friend, your gaze is a poor leash for a man like me. If you wish to keep me close, you'll need to use something far more tangible. Flesh, bones, or... your shackles.

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: As you wish.

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: Well? Does that satisfy you?

default.title: Level Up
default.text: Power. I know its touch well.

default.title: Pat Head
default.text: A gentleman's hairstyle is his crown. I'm flattered by your attention, but let's keep it a visual appreciation.
